prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次约 492→795→504→1315→478 名，波动较大；2024 年出现 1315 名的异常高点后，2025 年回落至 478 名，近两年基准位次约 478 名；该校在山西省理科/物理类招生计划：2021 年 28 人、2022 年 28 人、2023 年 26 人、2024 年 24 人、2025 年 26 人；2026 年计划 18 人，较 2025 年缩招约 30.8%，竞争明显加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 17 名（近年稳定在 17–19 名），属全国顶尖高校层次；2026 年声誉评价偏负面（师德师风、校园安全等事件），但作为文科顶尖名校，对理科招生影响有限；抖音热度排名第 44（较热），整体曝光度中等；未见明显投档断档记录；A- 及以上学科 15 个，包括法学 A+、应用经济学 A+、工商管理 A+、新闻传播学 A+、统计学 A+、理论经济学 A+、社会学 A+、马克思主义理论 A+ 等，人文社科实力全国顶尖；理科招生专业（统计学、计算机、人工智能等）对应学科评估均为 A/A+ 级别。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 统计学类、计算机类、人工智能等理科招生专业均为 2026 年高热推荐专业，报考热度高；本省 2026 年物理类考生约 167419 人，较 2025 年 173347 人减少约 3.4%，竞争略有缓解；中国人民大学位于北京，对山西省考生有较强吸引力；该校在山西省招生占比约 2.5%–4.7%（2021–2025 年），非主要生源省份，地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 478 名、2026 年大幅缩招约 30.8%（竞争加剧）、物理类考生小幅减少（竞争略有缓解）、理科招生专业均为高热推荐专业（竞争加剧）等因素；预测最低位次约390名，区间340–440名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 492 → 795 → 504 → 1315 → 478, showing significant fluctuations; after an abnormal high of 1315 in 2024, it dropped to 478 in 2025, with a recent baseline ranking of about 478; the university's enrollment plan in Shanxi Province for science/physics category: 28 in 2021, 28 in 2022, 26 in 2023, 24 in 2024, 26 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 18, a reduction of about 30.8% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 17th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking (stable at 17–19 in recent years), belonging to the top tier of national universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (incidents related to teacher ethics, campus safety, etc.), but as a top liberal arts university, its impact on science admissions is limited; Douyin popularity ranking is 44th (relatively popular), with moderate overall exposure; no obvious enrollment gaps recorded; 15 disciplines rated A- or above, including A+ in Law, A+ in Applied Economics, A+ in Business Administration, A+ in Journalism and Communication, A+ in Statistics, A+ in Theoretical Economics, A+ in Sociology, A+ in Marxist Theory, etc., with humanities and social sciences strength at the national top level; science admission majors (Statistics, Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, etc.) correspond to discipline evaluations at A/A+ levels.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Science admission majors such as Statistics, Computer Science, and Artificial Intelligence are all highly recommended popular majors for 2026, with high application enthusiasm; the number of physics category candidates in the province for 2026 is about 167,419, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, slightly easing competition; Renmin University of China is located in Beijing, which has strong appeal to candidates from Shanxi Province; the university's enrollment proportion in Shanxi Province is about 2.5%–4.7% (2021–2025), not a major source province, so regional preference impact is limited.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 478, a significant enrollment reduction of about 30.8% in 2026 (intensified competition), a slight decrease in physics category candidates (slightly eased competition), and all science admission majors being highly recommended popular majors (intensified competition); the predicted minimum ranking is about 390, with a range of 340–440.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 340–440, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Computer Science and Statistics as main targets, Tier 1 Law can be a reach, and Tier 3 Mathematics as a safety; if your ranking is better than 340, you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 Law and Statistics as flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 66→80→81→84→92, showing a continuous slow backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 26 positions over 5 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 92; the university's enrollment plan in Shanxi Province for liberal arts/history category: 27 in 2021, 27 in 2022, 25 in 2023, 25 in 2024, 38 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 35, a slight reduction of about 7.9% compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 17th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, belonging to the top tier of national universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (incidents of teacher ethics), but as a top liberal arts university, the impact of reputation fluctuations on application popularity is limited; Douyin popularity ranking 44th (relatively popular), with moderate exposure; no obvious gaps in admission records; 15 disciplines rated A- or above, including A+ in Law, A+ in Journalism and Communication, A+ in Business Administration, A+ in Applied Economics, A+ in Theoretical Economics, A+ in Sociology, A+ in Chinese Language and Literature, A+ in Statistics, etc., with comprehensive strength in humanities and social sciences ranking top nationally.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popularity of liberal arts majors is diverging: Law (slightly recommended), Finance/Finance and Economics/Economics (wait and see), Journalism and Communication (clearly discouraged); the number of history category examinees in this province in 2026 is approximately 63,113, a significant decrease of about 25.6% from 84,879 in 2025, markedly easing competition; Renmin University of China is located in Beijing, which has strong appeal to Shanxi Province examinees; the university's enrollment proportion in Shanxi Province is about 2.5%–4.7%, not a major source province, so regional preference impact is limited.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 92, a slight enrollment reduction of about 7.9% in 2026 (slightly intensified competition), a significant decrease of about 25.6% in history category examinees (markedly eased competition), and the historical trend of continuous backward shift; considering the mitigating effect of the significant decrease in examinees, a moderate forward shift of 5 positions; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 83, with a range of 63–103.
